channel.title: RSA on After the Code
channel.description: Recent content in RSA on After the Code

item.title: Cryptography Guide for Practical Security Professionals
item.description: In practical cryptography, failures often occur in the design—combining randomness, key management, operating modes, error handling, and authentication—rather than in the algorithms themselves. This post outlines criteria for auditing cryptographic implementations from the perspective of security assessors and reversers.
